task_text: Design (design-only, no implementation) Commerce Slice C staff actions / order status transitions: transition matrix, authority matrix (against the actual single-user cockpit auth), audit row shapes, write-safety/locking/concurrency, customer-visible effects (none), payment/POS boundaries, UI plan, tests planned, operator gates. Recommend the smallest safe Slice C. Codex review (5 lenses incl. write-safety/concurrency) before any build.
